ham.subject: Your Order #1234567890 Confirmation – Amazon.in
ham.body:
Hi John Doe,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.in. Your order #1234567890 has been successfully placed on 15 Apr 2026 at 10:23 AM.

Order Summary:
• Product: Bose QuietComfort 45 Wireless Headphones
• Quantity: 1
• Price: ₹10,999

Shipping Address:
John Doe
123, Oak Street
Hyderabad – 500001
India

We will notify you once your items are dispatched.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Verify Your Zoom Account Before Scheduled Meeting
spam.body:
Dear Client,

An urgent security update requires you to verify your Zoom account before the scheduled meeting on 15 Apr 2026 at 02:00 PM. Failure to complete this verification could result in the meeting being canceled and possible loss of access to critical documents.

Please confirm your identity by clicking the link below and entering the verification code:

<URL>

Meeting ID: 987654321
Password: 123456

If you do not take action within 30 minutes, the meeting will be automatically locked.

Regards,
Zoom Security Team
